title: Investigation Opened for Extending Additional Financial Obligation in Polyester Fiber Imports
bodyHtml:
Upon the application made by domestic producers for the extension of the protection measure implemented by Presidential Decree No. 4412 and applied as the collection of additional financial obligations for the import of polyester fiber defined as "Polyesters" in the Customs Tariff Statistics Position (GTIP) 5503.20.00.00.00, an investigation has been initiated.

The questionnaire forms related to the investigation and the non-confidential summary of the application can be found on the Ministry's website (http://www.ticaret.gov.tr) under the "Import" section in the "Trade Policy Defense Instruments" page under the link "Protection Measures/Investigations". The page for this investigation can be downloaded from the relevant section.

The interested parties are required to fill out the questionnaire form and submit it to the General Directorate within thirty days from the publication date of the Notification.

Click here for the Investigation Notification.
